title: Projects
text:
Technical projects, implementations, and research experiments.
Each project includes source code, documentation, and — where applicable — links to the relevant papers or references.

Projects will appear here as they are published. Check back soon, or visit the GitHub repository for the latest work.

title: Notes
text:
Short-form research notes, reading logs, implementation sketches, and work-in-progress observations.
Unlike full articles, notes are informal — meant to capture ideas and technical details as they develop.

Research notes will appear here as they are written.

title: About
text:
Eigenholm is a personal technical site and research notebook focused on machine learning, deep learning, mathematics, and scientific computing.
The writing here covers paper analyses, implementation notes, reproductions of published results, and documentation of technical projects. The goal is to think carefully, build from first principles, and share what is learned along the way.

title: My First Technical Post
My First Technical Post
My First Technical Post
text:
A mathematical example
Consider the mean squared error:
\[
\mathcal{L}(\theta)
=
\frac{1}{N}
\sum_{i=1}^{N}
\left(f_\theta(x_i)-y_i\right)^2
\tag{1}\]
Equation Equation 1 measures the average squared difference between predictions and targets.

title: My First Technical Post
text:
A Python example

import numpy as np 
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

x = np.linspace(-3, 3, 200) 
y = x**2

plt.plot(x, y) 
plt.xlabel("x") 
plt.ylabel("x²") 
plt.title("Quadratic function") 
plt.show()
